ResearchProjectDef.label: sonic transducer
ResearchProjectDef.description: Produce a light turret which uses sonic to damage anyone in its path.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->went deaf after getting glanced by the shockwave
subject_story->teleported excess sound cannons to the "Grey Planet"

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced sonic transducer
ResearchProjectDef.description: Improves the basic Sound Cannon to be reusable and more sturdier.

rulesStrings.li: subject_story->tried unsuccessfully to save the research project
